privileged_info_summary: Task.json contains no 'metadata' field, so there are no metadata claims to verify. However, key task facts have been verified: (1) The image source is real—downloaded from a valid Unsplash URL (photo-1506905925346-21bda4d32df4) which returns HTTP 200 and serves a 800x533 JPEG image; (2) The task uses GIMP's Unsharp Mask filter (Filters → Enhance → Unsharp Mask) to sharpen images; (3) Recommended parameters are Radius 1.0-3.0 pixels, Amount 0.5-1.5, Threshold 0-5; (4) Verification uses multiple metrics: edge enhancement ratio (target 1.15-1.40 or 15-40% increase), detail increase (>5%), structural similarity (SSIM ≥ 0.85), and ensures not over-sharpened (ratio < 1.60); (5) Pass threshold is 75% (4 out of 5 criteria met).
